notes: Measured PAS/FRD polar dataset for Spitfire Cloud. MLS SPL FRD measurements only (phase, GIFs, filters, diffraction, VituixCAD full-space and driver response files excluded). Verbatim source values, no smoothing/normalisation/resampling. Vertical 0° shares the horizontal 0° on-axis response per speaker designer confirmation. This file is not read by the legacy loader (measuredDatasetLoader.jsx ignores metadata.json) but is read by the Generic Measured Polar Dataset Platform's health check.
